title: Logging in on two different systems
excerpt:
Wondering if a person can be logged in to their account on two separate laptops? Or one laptop and one cpu etc? 
Or once you are logged in, you can’t log in anywhere else? 
Thanks!

posts.author: Chelsea74 (Chelsea Noble)
posts.cookedHtml:
Wondering if a person can be logged in to their account on two separate laptops? Or one laptop and one cpu etc?
Or once you are logged in, you can’t log in anywhere else?
Thanks!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Chelsea74 You should be able to log into your account across seperate laptops/devices, and remain logged in! Let us know if this causes any issues for you!
